agilitycompetition

Class Competitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • agilitycompetition.Dog
      • agilitycompetition.Pet
        • agilitycompetition.Competitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<Dog>

    public class Competitor
extends Pet
    Course: CSCI 160
    Project: AgilityCompetition (Version 2 Solution)
    File: Contest.java
    Uses: Date, ElapsedTime
    Extends: Pet
    Overrides: Comparable <Dog>
    A class to model a competitor with an elapsed time on the course.
    Author:
    aapplin

    • Constructor Detail

      • Competitor

        public Competitor(Date birthDate,
                  java.lang.String breed,
                  double weight,
                  java.lang.String name,
                  java.lang.String owner,
                  ElapsedTime time)
        Parameterized Constructor for Competitor
        Parameters:
        birthDate - the dog's date of birth (Date)
        breed - the dog's breed
        weight - the dog's weight
        name - the pet's name
        owner - the pet's owner's name
        time - the time that the competitor ran the course in

    • Method Detail

      • getTime

        public ElapsedTime getTime()
        Accessor for the course time
        Returns:
        the value of course time

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        toString allows an object to be directly printed by returning a String that can be printed to the console or to a file.
        Overrides:
        toString in class Pet
        Returns:
        a formatted string representing the values of the attributes for a dog object.

      • compareTo

        public int compareTo(Dog that)
        compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects. compareTo is used by the Collections.sort routine to allow us to sort the competitors belonging to some Java collection.
        Specified by:
        compareTo in interface java.lang.Comparable<Dog>
        Overrides:
        compareTo in class Pet
        Parameters:
        that - is the Dog object we are comparing this one to
        Returns:
        a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer if this object comes before, is equal to, or comes after the specified object.

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        Unit Test for the Competitor class.
        Parameters:
        args - the command line arguments
